Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-17-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Stipulation And Requesting Court To Retain Jurisdiction Under Ccp Section 664.6
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua Duffy, Esq. 714-427-6800 of Assayag Mauss LLP for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MUFG UNION BANK, N.A.'S Motion For Order Approving Stipulation And Requesting Court To Retain Jurisdiction Under Ccp Section 664.6.

Grant. The parties have stipulated to the order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
